title: crataegus monogyna f. stricta
intro: Crataegus monogyna f. stricta is a rare and lesser-known variety of the common hawthorn tree, characterized by its more upright growth habit and smaller leaves compared to the typical Crataegus monogyna. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna f. stricta include its high content of bioflavonoids, flavonoids, and other polyphenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits associated with Crataegus monogyna f. stricta include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and provide antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Crataegus monogyna f. stricta can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
